title: crotalaria breviflora var. pohliana
intro: Crotalaria breviflora var. pohliana, also known as the Pohli's rattlebox, is a plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae) and is native to the tropical regions of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. It is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Crotalaria breviflora var. pohliana are used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
